message:
refactor(cli): integrate offline library into unified registry loading

Previously, the sync command, search command, and other CLI features
had separate, duplicated logic for reading the offline library cache.
This created maintenance burden and inconsistency in how synced prompts
were accessed across commands.

Changes to offline.ts:
- Export SyncMeta interface for reuse
- Add getOfflinePromptAsPrompt() to convert SyncedPrompt to Prompt type
- Export getLibraryDir, getLibraryPath, getMetaPath, readSyncMeta,
  formatSyncAge for use by other modules

Changes to registry-loader.ts:
- Import offline library utilities
- Add loadOfflinePrompts() helper to convert synced prompts to Prompt[]
- Integrate offline prompts into merge chain: offline -> cached/remote -> local
- This ensures synced premium prompts appear in all CLI commands
  (list, search, show, copy, render, etc.)

Changes to sync.ts:
- Remove duplicated SyncMeta, getLibraryDir, readMeta, readLibrary,
  formatAge functions - now imported from offline.ts
- Simplify to use shared utilities

Changes to search.ts:
- Switch from static prompts import to dynamic loadRegistry()
- Pass pre-built BM25Index and promptsMap to searchPrompts for efficiency
- Remove duplicated personal search code (handled by registry integration)

Changes to notes.ts:
- Add prompt existence validation using loadRegistry()
- Prevents API calls for non-existent prompt IDs

This DRYs up the codebase and ensures synced prompts are consistently
available everywhere, enabling true offline-first CLI usage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
